runtimeSourceMixBeforeAfter.evidenceCase: trusted refs + one session continuity ref + aggregate counters present
interpretation: before counted aggregate totalRefs/trustedRefs as if they were source kinds, diluting trusted ratio and authority score
after only counts actual source-kind refs, reducing conservative noise
session-derived continuity still contributes to derived pressure but no longer pollutes supportingKinds
